name: scaffold
description: Scaffolding, validation, and editing for Claude Code agents, skills, MCP servers, and bash hooks/scripts. Ships /new-agent, /new-skill, /new-mcp, /new-script (generators); /audit-agent, /audit-skill, /audit-mcp, /audit-script (validators); /edit-agent, /edit-skill, /edit-mcp, /edit-script (focused edits with audit-bracketed regression checks). Backed by canonical best-practice references including script-style.md (S1-S20 structured-bash rules).
